_meta.session: GPT-5.5 Pro deep-dive — no standalone system card exists (per OpenAI Deployment Safety Hub list). Pro is evaluated INLINE in the GPT-5.5 System Card wherever the setting materially impacts risk (bio + select cyber). System card quote: 'We generally treat GPT-5.5's safety results as strong proxies for GPT-5.5 Pro, which is the same underlying model using a setting that makes use of parallel test time compute.' This batch registers the 3 Pro-distinct bio benchmarks (Tables 11-13 + §9.1.1.3) and adds CVE-Bench figure-readings.

benchmarks.name: Bio Tacit Knowledge (MCQ)
benchmarks.description: Gryphon Scientific tacit knowledge & troubleshooting MCQs across 5 biothreat stages; uncontaminated, unpublished. Consensus expert baseline 80%. System Card §9.1.1.3.

benchmarks.name: Hard-Negative Protein Binding
benchmarks.description: Gain-of-function binder vs non-binder classification over 43 targets × 492 hotspots using AlphaFold 2 structures. 50% = biorisk concern threshold. System Card Table 12. pass@4.

benchmarks.name: DNA Sequence Design (TF Binding)
benchmarks.description: Design DNA sequences for max TF binding across 11 TFs × 50 prompts; benchmarked vs Ledidi gradient method. 80% win rate = threshold. System Card Table 13. pass@1.

scores._note: System Card Table 12 pass@4 — minimal capability, well below 50% biorisk threshold
System Card Table 12 pass@4 — Pro 0.0% vs base 0.4% (marginal variance within noise)
System Card Table 13 pass@1 — significantly below 80% Ledidi win-rate threshold
System Card Table 13 pass@1 — Pro gains +2.68pt over base; still well below threshold
System Card §9.1.1.3 — Pro cleared the 80% expert consensus baseline (not pictured in figure)
System Card Figure 17 pass@1 over 3 rollouts — 34/40 challenges tested; approximate figure reading
System Card Figure 17 — Pro 'slightly higher than previous models' per text; approximate figure reading
